chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P. No.D-3906 of 2022 Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on office objection No.3, 18 & 26. 2. For hearing of main case. 18.7.2022 Mr.Muhammad Umer Panhwar, Advocate for petitioner a/w petitioner. Mr.Abdul Jalil Zubedi, AAG. DSP Nawaz, SI Naeem and IO PI Sajjad Ali. ************* IO, in response to notice, is present, has recorded statement of petitioner stating that she, on her own, left house of her husband and has come to Karachi and is residing with her father. Meanwhile she has filed a suit for Khula bearing F.S. No.2516/2022 in the Court of III-Family Judge, Karachi East against her husband who has lodged subject FIR falsely. IO submits that in the light of such statement, he would dispose of the case under “C” Class. The petitioner and her counsel are satisfied and accordingly the petition is disposed of. JUDGE JUDGE Shakeel, PS.
